overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character in a long coat walking along a snowy railway path at dusk. The scene transitions from purple twilight to deep blue night as the character passes Hogwarts castle and encounters other students along the mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain railway path between cliff and stone wall

events.description: sky transitions from purple-pink dusk to deep blue night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path beside train tracks

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow rising beside the tracks
metal railway tracks running parallel to the walking path
tall dark stone wall running along the right side of the path
snow-covered cobblestone walkway between the tracks and wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy railway path at dusk, with purple and pink hues in the sky gradually deepening to night blue. Snow-covered cliffs rise on the left while a stone retaining wall runs along the right, with empty train tracks visible beside the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hogwarts castle approach with railway platform

events.description: Hogwarts castle comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the castle emerges into view ahead

notable_agents.action: student sitting on the stone wall overlooking the railway tracks
student standing on the wall near the castle entrance

entered.detail: large gothic stone castle with illuminated towers and multiple spires

segments.scene_description: As night fully settles with a deep blue sky, the iconic Hogwarts castle comes into view on the right, its illuminated towers rising against the darkness. The character passes students sitting and standing along the stone wall while approaching the massive castle structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain railway path with distant peaks

events.description: snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the night passing other students along the wall

notable_agents.action: student leaning against the stone wall
two students conversing together by the stone wall

entered.detail: distant snow-covered mountain peak visible under the night sky ahead

segments.scene_description: Passing beyond the castle which disappears behind the retaining wall, the character continues through the snowy night with a distant mountain peak now visible ahead. Other students appear intermittently along the right wall as the path stretches forward into the wintry landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy railway path as the atmosphere shifts from a colorful twilight to a deep, wintry night. It begins with the character walking between snow-covered cliffs and a stone retaining wall under a sky of deepening purple and pink hues. As the light fades into a dark blue night, the scene opens to reveal the illuminated towers of Hogwarts castle rising on the right, where the character passes groups of students gathered along the wall. The camera then continues forward as the castle disappears behind the stone barrier, shifting the focus toward a distant mountain peak visible through the darkness. Finally, the path stretches further into the snowy landscape, passing intermittent students as the journey progresses into the cold night.
